title: Cuneiform Tablet #0076: Neo-Assyrian Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
